How to compare HVAC quotes correctly

HVAC quotes are notoriously hard to compare because contractors rarely quote the same equipment, tonnage, or install scope. A $7,000 quote and a $12,000 quote can be for wildly different systems — different SEER2 ratings, different brands, one with a Manual J load
